title: Onboarding - Permission for location tracking is not accepted [Android]
scenario: Denying location tracking permission during onboarding on the "Organized" screen leaves the FMD window open and shows a secondary pop-up instead of returning the user to skip that step.
steps: 3. When prompted for location tracking permission, deny the system location permission
expected: Denying location tracking should return the user to the "Organized" screen and allow them to skip that step in onboarding.
